mapper.sql: id, worker_type, worker_status, signal_date, is_use, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gupiao_worker (worker_type, signal_date, remark) values
(#{worker.workerType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{worker.signalDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{worker.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
INSERT INTO gupiao_worker (worker_type, signal_date, remark) values (#{worker.workerType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{worker.signalDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{worker.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM gupiao_worker WHERE is_use=1 AND signal_date=#{signalDate, jdbcType=DATE}
SELECT FROM gupiao_worker WHERE is_use=1 AND worker_status=0
SELECT FROM gupiao_worker WHERE is_use=1 AND worker_status=3
mapper.update: UPDATE gupiao_worker SET worker_status=1 WHERE is_use=1 AND worker_status=0 AND id=#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE gupiao_worker SET worker_status=0 WHERE is_use=1 AND worker_status=3 AND id=#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE gupiao_worker SET worker_status=2 WHERE is_use=1 AND worker_status=1 AND id=#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE gupiao_worker SET worker_status=3 WHERE is_use=1 AND worker_status=1 AND id=#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE gupiao_worker SET remark=#{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE id=#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
